title: Ashley Housewares Triple Venetian Blind Cleaner - Removable, Hand Washable Microfibre Fabric Duster For Wet Or Dry Cleaning Of Slats
features: Variable height for any slat spacing's
Use as a dry duster or wet cleaner
Suitable for all types of venetian blind
description: Ashley Housewares Blinds Cleaner 3 Strips - Cleans 3 blinds at once - in no time. - Height adjustable to the respective slat spacing - Removable, washable microfibre cloth - Can be used dry for dusting and damp for cleaning - Suitable for all types of blinds
